title: tylanthus litoralis
intro: Tylanthus litoralis, also known as Sea Whitlow Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Tylanthus litoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in the healing process of wounds. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
